q: Do you prefer the mountains or the sea?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi yêu cầu sự lựa chọn và giải thích lý do (Preferences & Reasons). Bạn nên so sánh đặc điểm của cả hai địa danh. Ví dụ: Biển mang lại cảm giác phóng khoáng, sôi động (vibrant, expansive); Ngọn núi mang lại sự tĩnh lặng, hùng vĩ (majestic, serene). Hãy sử dụng các cụm từ như 'I’m more of a mountain/sea person', 'the vastness of the ocean', 'the crisp mountain air'.

band7.text: I’d definitely say I prefer the sea. I love the feeling of the sand between my toes and the sound of the waves. It’s so relaxing to just sit on the beach and watch the sunset. The mountains are beautiful too, but I find the ocean more rejuvenating.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, có lý do rõ ràng. Sử dụng tốt các từ vựng mô tả cảm giác (sand between my toes, sound of waves, rejuvenating).

band8.text: I’m firmly in the 'mountain person' camp. I find the crisp mountain air and the sense of solitude you get at high altitudes far more appealing than a crowded beach. There’s something incredibly humbling about being surrounded by such majestic peaks. To me, the mountains offer a perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of city life.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao và tự nhiên (firmly in the camp, crisp air, solitude, high altitudes, humbling, majestic peaks). Cách lập luận rõ ràng và sâu sắc.

band9.text: That’s a difficult choice, as both environments offer unique forms of serenity. However, if I had to choose, I’d gravitate towards the sea. I’m perpetually drawn to the sheer expansiveness of the ocean and the rhythmic, almost hypnotic cadence of the waves. While the mountains provide a majestic sense of permanence, the ocean represents a dynamic, ever-changing landscape that I find profoundly inspiring and revitalizing.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở mức độ chuyên gia (gravitate towards, perpetually drawn, expansiveness, hypnotic cadence, permanence, dynamic, revitalizing). Cấu trúc câu phức tạp và mang tính triết lý cao.

v.example: I've always been more of a mountain person than a sea person.
As a sea person, I spend every summer at the coast.

v.meaning: không khí trong lành/se lạnh (thường ở vùng núi)
v.example: The crisp mountain air is so refreshing in the morning.

v.meaning: sự tĩnh lặng/đơn độc (một cách tích cực)
v.example: He went to the forest seeking solitude.

v.meaning: độ cao lớn (so với mực nước biển)
v.example: Cooking takes longer at high altitude because water boils at a lower temperature.

v.meaning: khiến mình cảm thấy nhỏ bé/khiêm tốn
v.example: Looking at the stars is a truly humbling experience.
The majestic peaks of the Alps were covered in snow.

v.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
v.example: I want to escape the hustle and bustle of London for a bit.
The sheer expansiveness of the desert was overwhelming.

v.meaning: nhịp điệu gây mê hoặc/thôi miên
v.example: The hypnotic cadence of the raindrops on the roof helped me sleep.
Mountains give me a sense of permanence in an ever-changing world.

v.meaning: làm hồi sinh/tiếp thêm sinh lực
v.example: A week by the sea was very revitalizing after months of hard work.
The spa treatment was incredibly rejuvenating.
We stayed in a charming coastal village.
The Scottish Highlands are famous for their beautiful scenery.
Rice is mostly grown in the fertile lowlands.
Pollution is a huge threat to marine life.
The rainforest boasts a diverse range of fauna and flora.
The ocean was a brilliant emerald color.

v.meaning: màu xanh da trời trong vắt
v.example: The azure sky was without a single cloud.
Jeeps are necessary to navigate this rugged terrain.
I love walking along the sandy shores at sunset.
The sound of crashing waves is incredibly relaxing.
The castle was built on top of towering cliffs.
The countryside was full of green rolling hills.
We saw the snow-capped mountains from the window.
The penthouse provides a panoramic view of the whole city.
New Zealand is world-famous for its scenic beauty.
We found a secluded spot for our picnic.
The sky looked boundless from the cockpit.
The fireworks were spectacular.

v.meaning: khiến người khác nể phục/choáng ngợp
v.example: The scale of the project is truly awe-inspiring.
The view from the top was breathtaking.
The pyramids are a monumental achievement of ancient engineering.
The village is a tranquil haven away from the city.
She has a very serene attitude towards life.
A morning swim is very invigorating.
The cold lemonade was very refreshing on such a hot day.
The cathedral is truly magnificent inside.
The vastness of space is hard to comprehend.
The lake is famous for its pristine waters.
They sailed across uncharted oceans for months.
She looked down into the dark abyss of the canyon.
The sun disappeared below the horizon.
The tide is coming in, so we should move our things.
The coral reef is home to thousands of fish species.
The small town is nestled in a deep valley.
We followed the forest trail for two miles.
He finally reached the mountain peak after a long climb.
We live in the foothills of the Rockies.
